description:
Their debut album Second Nature explores memory, belonging, and personal
transformation through intimate storytelling. The forthcoming R‑Evolution
expands outward — a groove-driven meditation on climate, power, protest, and
collective reimagining — inviting listeners not just to hear, but to inhabit
the music.
name: Windmills Music Night - Sage For The Ages - BLR

performer.description: Sage for The Ages creates immersive music for the dreamer-listener — soundscapes where jazz improvisation meets neo-soul warmth, psychedelic color, and ambient depth. Led by writer, vocalist, and guitarist Kirtana Krishna, the band balances inward reflection with social awareness, turning lived experience into atmosphere and narrative. Pianist Aman Mahajan shapes the music with surprising harmonic pathways, bassist Dhani Muniz structures each piece with a producer’s ear for tone and space, and drummer Raul Mattia grounds the ensemble in steady, intentional motion.
performer.name: Sage For The Ages

description:
Blending Bruce’s genre-fluid guitar and compositional sensibility with
Pallavi’s evocative interpretations, Kayaka weaves Western acoustic folk,
blues, world music, and jazz with Indian folk and classical traditions,
creating a stirring, thought-provoking musical experience.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Kayaka-HYD

performer.description: Kayaka (‘work’) brings together renowned Bangalore musicians MD Pallavi and Bruce Lee Mani to reimagine ancient, progressive Indian poetry within a contemporary musical framework. Drawing primarily from the Vachanas - powerful 11th-century verses written by cobblers, weavers, sex workers, and other working-class voices. The concert foregrounds radical thought that remains strikingly relevant today. A recipient of the prestigious Vachanasri Award, Pallavi has long engaged with this body of work.
performer.name: Kayaka

description:
"It is an aural punch in the gut, delivered with a velvet glove. The raw power
of Sarvjeet Tamta's vocals makes one shake one's head in wonder and then shake
it many more times with the sheer joy that infuses the music. It is not easy
to resist the magnetic charm, the sheer power of the music that comes from the
very depths of their hearts and reaches the very depths of the listeners' as
well." - Sarthak Kaushik, 104.6FM.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Rehmat-e-Nusrat Live: Qawwali Unplugged - HYD

performer.description: Formed by lead vocalist & harmonium virtuoso Sarvjeet Tamta, Rehmat-e-Nusrat brings a fresh new perspective to the timeless tradition of qawwali music. These young musicians perform original compositions and qawwalis, Sufiyana kalaams by great poets, and Kabir bhajans.
performer.name: Rehmat-e-Nusrat

description:
Together, they craft a powerful musical experience that bridges classical
traditions with contemporary expression. Through original compositions and
innovative arrangements, Lakkshya explores new sonic landscapes while
remaining rooted in Indian classical sensibilities, delivering performances
that are energetic, immersive, and deeply musical.
name: Windmills Music Night - Lakkshya - BLR

performer.description: Lakkshya is a contemporary Indian fusion ensemble that blends the depth of Carnatic music with modern global influences. The band brings together accomplished musicians who create a rich and dynamic sound through expressive melodies, rhythmic complexity, and improvisation. The ensemble features K. J. Diliip on violin, Ila Diliip on violin and vocals, Sunaad Anoor on percussions, Gopi Shravan on drums, Vivek Santosh on keyboard, and Bruthuva Caleb on bass.
performer.name: Lakkshya

description:
A Princeton-trained musician, Jordan has performed in over 60 countries,
collaborated with icons like Dizzy Gillespie and Quincy Jones, and earned
multiple Grammy nominations, continually pushing boundaries across genres,
technology, and live performance. He will be joined by Kenwood Dennard on
drums and keyboards, a powerhouse musician celebrated for his dynamic
versatility, deep groove, and collaborations with legends like Herbie
Hancock—bringing an electrifying rhythmic and harmonic dimension to the
performance.
name: Windmills Music Night - Stanley Jordan Duo Ft. Kenwood Dennard - BLR

performer.description: Stanley Jordan is a visionary guitarist whose groundbreaking two-handed “touch technique” redefined modern jazz performance, allowing him to play melody and harmony simultaneously with piano-like independence. Rising to fame with Magic Touch (1985), which topped Billboard’s jazz chart for a record 51 weeks, he blended technical brilliance with warmth and musical depth.
performer.name: Stanley Jordan Duo Ft. Kenwood Dennard

description:
Mukhtiyar Ali gained global recognition through the Kabir Project, making his
international debut in 2007 and performing across Europe, North America, and
Asia. He has collaborated with artists like Mathias Duplessy and contributed
to films such as Tashan and Delhi in a Day. His soulful performances bridge
centuries-old traditions with contemporary world music, earning him critical
acclaim and a global audience.
name: Windmills Music Night - Mir Mukhtiyar Ali - BLR

performer.description: Mir Mukhtiyar Ali is a celebrated folk and Sufi singer from Pugal village in the Bikaner district of Rajasthan, India. Belonging to the semi-nomadic Mirasi community, he represents the 26th generation preserving the oral tradition of Sufiana Qalam. His music blends raw Rajasthani folk with refined classical elements, bringing alive the poetry of Kabir, Mirabai, and Bulleh Shah.
performer.name: Mir Mukhtiyar Ali

description:
The show revisits their timeless contributions, blending history, performance,
and storytelling into one wholesome experience. Curated and written by Avanti
Patel, and directed by Mallika Singh and Meghana AT, the show is a heartfelt
ode to legendary performers such as Gauhar Jaan, Begum Akhtar, Iqbal Bano,
Shobha Gurtu and several women artists after them.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - O Gaanewali - HYD

performer.description: O Gaanewali is a unique musical celebration of the women who defined, popularised, and immortalised genres like Thumri, Dadra, Ghazal, Chaiti, Hori, and more. These women, known as gaanewalis, carried an unparalleled legacy of artistry and emotion, shaping Hindustani semi classical music history.
performer.name: O Gaanewali

description:
Their second album, People to Meet, Places to See, is a sonic diary of life on
the road—each track capturing a city, mood, or moment from their India tours.
From the laid-back charm of Cubbon Park to the pulsating rhythm of Techno
Police, the record weaves cinematic grooves that invite movement and joy.
Following acclaimed singles Jonty Patel and Ratna Mahal, the People to Meet,
Places to See – Album Launch marks a milestone in their journey, showcasing
their evolution as one of India’s most dynamic and genre-bending live acts.

address.streetAddress: Windmills Craftworks, Raheja Commerzone, Knowledge City, Rai Durg, Hyderabad - 500032Hyderabad

name: Windmills Music Night - Derek & The Cats -HYD

performer.description: Derek & The Cats is a Bangalore-based band led by Derek Mathias, known for their infectious blend of jazz, funk, and house. Renowned for their high-energy instrumental performances, the ensemble brings a fresh, dance-driven sound to every stage.
performer.name: Derek & The Cats
